message.content:
@startuml
participant SendMessageController as SC
participant SendMessageEngine as Sme
participant SendMessageSender as Sse
participant Socket as S

SC --> Sme : sendMessage(message)

Sme --> Sse : create(message, port)

Sse --> S : create(message.getInetAddress(), port)

Sme --> Sse : sendMessage()

Sse --> Sse : create(socket.getOutputStream())

Sse --> Sse : writeObject(message.getSheetTalkMessage())

Sse --> Sse : flush()

Sse --> Sse : close()

Sse --> S : close()

@enduml
